task_description: find all Markdown files, identify duplicated headings across files, generate a report, and save the results to CSV
code:
echo "File,Heading" > report.csv
cat duplicated_headings.txt | while read heading; do
    grep -r "$heading" $(grep -l "$heading" markdown_files.txt) >> report.csv
done

```sh
cat markdown_files.txt | xargs grep -oP '^\s*#.*' | sort | uniq -c | awk '$1>1 {print $2}' > duplicated_headings.txt
```
